title: Craft Family Design System
prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS design showcase for the Craft Family design system. Dark theme (#0f0f0f background) with ambient radial gradient lights (white top-left, yellow top-right for Life series, blue bottom). Features: (1) Series toggle pill buttons (Efficiency white / Life yellow) with animated transitions; (2) Large glassmorphism product card (240–300px) with gentle float animation, radial spotlight behind, shine sweep on hover, and oversized mono first-letter logo; (3) Fade-transitioned product name and description below card; (4) Glass modal with blur backdrop for product details, bottom-sheet on mobile / centered on desktop; (5) Dock navigation bar with 5 circular icon buttons, active state glow (white for Efficiency, yellow for Life), and hover tooltips. All interactions are pure CSS/JS with no external dependencies. Typography: Inter (sans) and SFMono (mono).

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif

title: Code-G Artifact
prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB scroll-driven transition experience. Start with a warm beige full-screen stage featuring a stylized human face (hair, eyebrows, eyes, and a mouth). The face subtly tilts and looks toward the mouse/touch position using CSS variables and 3D transforms. As the user scrolls (or swipes), the mouth scales up from a small circle to a large portal that fills the entire screen, revealing a deep burgundy homepage underneath. Add cute details like upper teeth and a tongue inside the mouth, an animated 'Scroll Up' hint that fades out, and a final WELCOME page with an ENTER HOME button. Use smooth lerp-based animation via requestAnimationFrame, wheel/touch event listeners, and a snap behavior that settles to either 0 or 1. Build everything with HTML, CSS, gradients, shadows, transforms, and Tailwind CDN utility classes. Preserve the playful, organic feel and the dramatic portal reveal. Use EC LAB / ec 的实验室 identity where appropriate.
